<!-- indicator: fig-pc-reason-no-hlthcare -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-pc-reason-no-hlthcare
#| fig-cap: 'Reasons Populations Served Can''t Get Needed Healthcare, Putnam County (n = 99)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Reasons Populations Served Can''t Get Needed Healthcare, Putnam County (n = 99).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-pc-reason-no-hlthcare", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
